headlines.title: Suspect charged with attempted assassination of Trump at Washington dinner
headlines.summary: Investigators say the 31-year-old California man wanted to kill as many high-level officials as possible.

headlines.title: United Arab Emirates to quit oil cartel Opec
headlines.summary: The UAE says it is leaving the Opec and Opec+ groups of major oil producing nations.

headlines.title: Iran offers to reopen Strait of Hormuz if US ends war and blockade
headlines.summary: Iran offered to end its chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz if the U.S. lifts its naval blockade and brings an end to the war.

headlines.title: Iran rejects ceasefire, demands permanent end to war
headlines.summary: Iran has conveyed its response to the U.S. proposal to Pakistan, rejecting a ceasefire and emphasizing the necessity of a permanent end to the war.

headlines.title: Russian superyacht sails through Strait of Hormuz despite blockade
headlines.summary: The 141m-long vessel, linked to a close ally of Russian President Vladimir Putin, cleared the waterway despite an ongoing blockade.

headlines.title: Man admits plotting attack on Taylor Swift concert in Vienna
headlines.summary: The state prosecutor told the court that police found an almost completed bomb in a search of the man's house.

headlines.title: Manhunt for suspected gunman aged 89 as five wounded in Athens
headlines.summary: Five people were left with life-threatening injuries, according to Greece's state broadcaster ERT.

headlines.title: Carney unveils $18 billion Canadian government-owned investment fund
headlines.summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney announces new sovereign wealth fund initiative.

headlines.title: New IRA threatens to target police homes with bombs after Belfast car bomb
headlines.summary: The New IRA said it would target the homes of police officers with bombs after confirming it planted a car bomb that exploded outside a police station in Belfast on Saturday.

headlines.title: Beijing Auto Show showcases hypercompetition driving car prices down in China
headlines.summary: The Beijing Auto Show demonstrates how competition has driven new car prices in China to a fraction of U.S. levels.
